stage1.name: Docs
exit_criteria: All required sections in README.md completed
Acceptance checklist covers happy path, state/policy, error/permission, data integrity
OMO metadata on non-manual acceptance items
Internal 1.5 docs gate passed (Codex review → Claude repair)

stage2.name: Backend
deliverables: Vitest unit tests (filtering, idempotency, invalid ignored)
Playwright E2E API tests (direct calls, no UI)
exit_criteria: E2E API tests pass (direct API calls, no UI)
4-step filter correctly processes invalid items (ignores, no error)
Response wrapper { success, data, error } applied

stage3.name: Backend Review
deliverables: Backend PR review (contract compliance, idempotency, error handling)

stage4.name: Frontend
deliverables: ShoppingPantryReflectPopup UI component (existing bottom sheet pattern)
Complete button click → popup display logic
3 choice handlers (모두 추가 / 선택 추가 / 추가 안 함)
API integration with response wrapper handling
Playwright E2E full scenarios (with popup UI)
5 UI states (loading / empty / error / read-only / unauthorized)
exit_criteria: All E2E tests pass (HP-1, HP-2, HP-3, HP-4, HP-5)
Response wrapper { success, data, error } handled

stage6.name: Frontend Review
deliverables: Frontend PR review (code quality, test coverage)

vitest.scope: Backend business logic, 4-step filter, 3-way semantics, idempotency, invalid item handling

playwright.scope: E2E user flows, API integration, UI interactions

POST /shopping/lists/:id/complete.idempotency: Already completed list returns 200 + same result (not 409)
POST /shopping/lists/:id/complete.invalid_items: Invalid IDs (other list / excluded / unchecked) are ignored (not 400), valid items only processed

columns.name: is_pantry_excluded
columns.description: 팬트리 제외 여부 (true면 추가 안 함)

constraints.condition: added_to_pantry = false OR (is_checked = true AND is_pantry_excluded = false)
constraints.description: added_to_pantry=true이면 반드시 체크되고 팬트리 제외 아니어야 함 (기존)

pantry_items.description: 완료 시 유효 아이템들이 pantry_items로 INSERT (아직 없는 ingredient만)

response_derived_values.pantry_added: 응답 payload에만 존재, shopping_lists 테이블에 영구 저장 안 됨. 서버는 shopping_list_items를 쿼리하여 계산.
response_derived_values.pantry_added_item_ids: 응답 payload에만 존재, shopping_lists 테이블에 영구 저장 안 됨. 서버는 shopping_list_items를 쿼리하여 계산.

invariants.I2: Idempotent: Already completed list returns 200 + same result
invariants.I6: Invalid items (other list / excluded / unchecked) are ignored, not rejected

design_classification.rationale: Existing SHOPPING_DETAIL screen + bottom sheet popup. No new design patterns. Small styling surface.
design_classification.stage5_approach: lightweight design check (spacing, typography, color tokens, 5 UI states)
